steps.title: Label the integers
steps.content: The first integer is $x$, so the second integer is $x+1$ and the third integer is $x+2$.

steps.title: Translate the comparison
steps.content: The sum of $6$ and the second integer is $6+(x+1)$. The product of $19$ and the third integer is $19(x+2)$.

steps.title: Use less than
steps.content:
The phrase "is less than" means the first expression is less than the second.
$$6+(x+1)<19(x+2)$$
The answer is B.
